Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given several tables Orders Order Lines Delivery Invoice Payments Products optional and Resources optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goal Create an event log with one row per event The event log should have at least Case ID order_id Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor optional and other attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 Identify cases Use order_id as Case ID 2 Derive activities from the tables We have the following activities a Order Created from Orders table using order_date b Items Picked from Order Lines table using item_picking_date c Order Dispatched from Delivery table using delivery_dispatch_date d Order Arrived from Delivery table using delivery_arrival_date e Invoice Issued from Invoice table using invoice_issue_date f Payment Received from Payments table using payment_date

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For Items Picked We have one row per item in Order Lines We can create one event per item picking or we can aggregate to one picking event per order In process mining it is common to have one event per item picking if we want to see the picking process in detail However if we do not need that detail we might summarize by taking the last picking time for the order as the order picking completion But note the problem says Items Picked events from the Order Lines table So we can have multiple picking events per order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly for delivery we have multiple deliveries per order so we can have multiple dispatch and arrival events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will create one event for each row in the tables but we must be cautious because the same activity might occur multiple times like picking dispatch arrival invoice payment We can differentiate by the activity name and the specific record like item_id for picking delivery_id for delivery invoice_id for invoice payment_id for payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Combine data We need to link events from different tables by order_id and by invoice_id for payments We will create a unified table with the following columns at least Case ID order_id Activity Name Timestamp Resource if available Other attributes like item_id delivery_id invoice_id payment_id

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have a Resources table that can be used to get the resource name and role but we can include the resource_id in the event log and then optionally join with the Resources table for more details However the problem says to include Resource Actor if available

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the activities and their sources 1 Order Created Source Orders table Timestamp order_date Resource sales_person_id Other attributes customer_id customer_type order_priority 2 Item Picked Source Order Lines table Timestamp item_picking_date Resource picker_id Other attributes item_id quantity 3 Order Dispatched Source Delivery table Timestamp delivery_dispatch_date Resource carrier_id Other attributes delivery_id delivery_note 4 Order Arrived Source Delivery table Timestamp delivery_arrival_date Resource carrier_id Other attributes delivery_id delivery_note 5 Invoice Issued Source Invoice table Timestamp invoice_issue_date Resource billing_person_id Other attributes invoice_id invoice_amount 6 Payment Received Source Payments table Timestamp payment_date Resource We do not have a resource for payment in the Payments table We might leave it blank Other attributes payment_id invoice_id payment_method payment_reference

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Payments table is linked by invoice_id and the Invoice table is linked by order_id So to get the order_id for a payment we need to go through the Invoice table

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Steps to create the event log a Start with the Orders table to create the Order Created events b For each order look at the Order Lines table and create an Item Picked event for each row c For each order look at the Delivery table and create two events for each row one for Order Dispatched and one for Order Arrived d For each order look at the Invoice table and create an Invoice Issued event for each invoice e For each invoice in the Invoice table look at the Payments table and create a Payment Received event for each payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the same order might have multiple events of the same type like multiple picking events multiple dispatch events and so on We will include them all We must ensure that the events are in chronological order for each case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We will create a unified table with the following columns Case ID order_id Activity Name Timestamp Resource we will use the resource_id from the source table and then we can map to the resource name if needed Other attributes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1001 Order Created 2024 01 01T09 00 00Z Resource SP 001 Item Picked ITEM 001 2024 01 02T10 15 00Z Resource WH 001 ITEM 002 2024 01 02T11 00 00Z Resource WH 002 Order Dispatched 2024 01 03T08 30 00Z Resource CR 01 delivery_id DLV 5001 Order Arrived 2024 01 05T14 45 00Z Resource CR 01 delivery_id DLV 5001 Invoice Issued 2024 01 06T09 00 00Z Resource BL 001 invoice_id INV 1001 Payment Received 2024 01 10T11 30 00Z payment_id PAY 2001 invoice_id INV 1001

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1002 Order Created 2024 01 02T12 30 00Z Resource SP 002 Item Picked ITEM 003 2024 01 03T09 45 00Z Resource WH 002 ITEM 005 2024 01 03T10 00 00Z Resource WH 001 Order Dispatched DLV 5002 2024 01 04T07 20 00Z Resource CR 02 DLV 5003 2024 01 05T07 00 00Z Resource CR 01 Order Arrived DLV 5002 2024 01 07T16 10 00Z Resource CR 02 DLV 5003 2024 01 08T10 00 00Z Resource CR 01 Invoice Issued INV 1002 2024 01 08T10 15 00Z Resource BL 002 INV 1003 2024 01 10T11 00 00Z Resource BL 002 Payment Received For INV 1002 PAY 2002 on 2024 01 12T14 00 00Z For INV 1003 PAY 2003 on 2024 01 15T09 00 00Z

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1003 Order Created 2024 01 03T10 00 00Z Resource SP 002 Item Picked ITEM 002 2024 01 05T15 30 00Z Resource WH 003 ITEM 006 2024 01 05T15 45 00Z Resource WH 001 Order Dispatched 2024 01 06T07 30 00Z Resource CR 03 delivery_id DLV 5004 Order Arrived 2024 01 07T20 00 00Z Resource CR 03 delivery_id DLV 5004 Invoice Issued 2024 01 09T08 00 00Z Resource BL 001 invoice_id INV 1004 Payment Received 2024 01 11T10 30 00Z payment_id PAY 2004 invoice_id INV 1004

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1004 Order Created 2024 01 04T14 15 00Z Resource SP 003 Item Picked ITEM 001 2024 01 06T08 00 00Z Resource WH 002 No delivery We do not have a delivery for order 1004 in the Delivery table No invoice We do not have an invoice for order 1004 in the Invoice table No payment We do not have a payment for order 1004

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1005 Order Created 2024 01 05T08 45 00Z Resource SP 001 Item Picked ITEM 007 2024 01 06T09 30 00Z Resource WH 003 ITEM 002 2024 01 06T09 45 00Z Resource WH 002 Order Dispatched 2024 01 07T10 15 00Z Resource CR 02 delivery_id DLV 5005 Order Arrived 2024 01 09T11 45 00Z Resource CR 02 delivery_id DLV 5005 Invoice Issued 2024 01 10T09 30 00Z Resource BL 003 invoice_id INV 1005 Payment Received 2024 01 15T12 00 00Z payment_id PAY 2005 invoice_id INV 1005

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We will also note that for order 1004 we only have the order creation and item picking events
